resources.string: TVClaw executes remote TV commands from your paired brain.
Looking for your TVClaw brain on the network…\n\nBuild %1$d — auto-connect (there is no Start bridge button on this build).

Connected to the brain.

You can steer the TV from your TVClaw WhatsApp group on your phone.

To run apps, search, and remote keys, turn on TVClaw in Android Accessibility:

1) Open Settings on this TV
2) Device preferences (or System) → Accessibility
3) Find TVClaw in the installed services list
4) Open it and turn it ON
5) Confirm any system prompt

Then use “Test connection” to verify.
Brain link is not ready yet. Wait for “Connected to the brain” above, or tap Try again.
Brain is connected, but TVClaw Accessibility is still OFF. Follow the steps above in Settings → Accessibility, then test again.
TV bridge stopped. Tap try again when you want to connect.
Advertising as %1$s on port %2$d — brain can find this TV
Network registration failed (code %1$d). Commands may still work if the brain knows this IP.
No app can install this update
Notifications are off — you may not see the brain connection status in the status area
Allow installing apps for TVClaw, then tap Update app again
